steps.title: Mark the practical alternative
steps.content: The first sentence says Kepler-1552b may be habitable but is too far away for humanity to use anytime soon. The next sentence shifts to a practical alternative: improving habitability within the solar system instead of relying on that distant planet.

steps.title: Reject example and sequence links
steps.content: Choice A would introduce an example, but the second sentence is not an example of Kepler-1552b. Choice B signals similarity, and Choice D signals sequence. The relationship is replacement: because the distant planet is impractical, humanity must focus on nearer planets. The answer is C.
